article.body_preview:
RANGPUR, June 1, 2023 (BSS) - The proposed budget is supportive of building a Smart Bangladesh and domestic industrial development in times of crises like rampant commodity prices, inflation, slowdown in exports and remittances, dollar crisis, rising electricity, gas and fuel prices.

President of Rangpur Chamber of Commerce and Industry (RCCI) Mostafa Sohrab Chowdhury Titu made the observation in an immediate reaction on the proposed budget for the 2023-2024 FY presented by Finance Minister AHM

llm_connections.evidence_quote: increase regulatory duties to discourage import of non-essential and luxury goods
llm_connections.scope_justification: The article describes a national budget measure explicitly intended "to discourage import of non-essential and luxury goods", which pertains to country-level import volumes as defined by 'imports'.

verification.quote_best_match: increase regulatory duties to discourage import of non-essential and luxury goods,
verification.judge_reasoning: The article contains the line stating the budget will "increase regulatory duties to discourage import of non-essential and luxury goods," which explicitly links the duty increase as intended to discourage imports and is presented as a national budget measure (country-level scope).
